74259:
If acne breakouts, post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation, and a dull, uneven skin tone are your daily skincare battles, this targeted combination addresses both active blemishes and their lingering marks. In Bangladesh's humid climate, where excess sebum and pollution constantly clog pores and trigger inflammation, a single cleanser often isn't enough to tackle both the root cause and the after-effects. The Acne Combo pairs a gentle salicylic acid foam wash with a high-concentration niacinamide serum, creating a two-step system that decongests pores while brightening dark spots and calming sensitivity.

This routine is designed to work in synergy: the Cicavita B5 Salicylic Acid Gentle Cleanser removes surface oil, dead skin cells, and impurities without stripping the barrier, while the Carenel Niacinamide 10% Zinc 1% Serum delivers a potent dose of brightening and oil-regulating actives onto freshly cleansed skin. For best results, follow the foaming cleanser with an alcohol-free toner applied while the skin is still slightly damp, then layer the serum before your moisturiser. This combination is particularly effective for acne-prone, combination, and oily skin types living in Dhaka or other high-humidity areas.

Key Benefits

  • Deep Pore Cleansing — Salicylic Acid penetrates oil-filled pores to dissolve sebum and prevent new breakouts
  • Brightening & Even Tone — 10% Niacinamide inhibits melanin transfer, reducing dark spots and post-acne marks
  • Sebum Regulation — Zinc works alongside Niacinamide to control excess oil production without drying the skin
  • Soothing & Calming — B5 (Panthenol) in the cleanser reduces redness and irritation often associated with acne treatments
  • Barrier Support — Gentle foaming action removes impurities while maintaining the skin's natural moisture balance
  • Dual-Action System — Combining a salicylic acid cleanser with a Niacinamide serum targets both active acne and hyperpigmentation in one routine step

Key Ingredients

Niacinamide (Vitamin B3) — At 10% concentration, this multi-tasking active brightens hyperpigmentation, strengthens the skin barrier, and reduces sebum production by inhibiting the transfer of melanin to skin cells

Zinc — A mineral that complements Niacinamide by controlling excess oil, minimising pore appearance, and providing anti-inflammatory support to calm active acne

Salicylic Acid — A beta-hydroxy acid (BHA) that is oil-soluble, allowing it to penetrate deep into pores to dissolve sebum, exfoliate dead skin cells, and prevent comedones from forming

Best For

  • Acne-prone and oily skin types experiencing both active breakouts and post-acne dark spots
  • Combination skin with an oily T-zone and occasional blemishes on cheeks or chin
  • Sensitive skin that needs gentle exfoliation without harsh physical scrubs or high-concentration acids
  • Hyperpigmentation concerns including dark spots, uneven skin tone, and dullness caused by previous acne
  • Those living in humid climates like Bangladesh who require oil control without stripping the moisture barrier

Not Recommended For

  • Dry or dehydrated skin types — the combination of Salicylic Acid and 10% Niacinamide may be overly drying if the skin barrier is compromised
  • Those with active eczema, rosacea, or severe skin sensitivity — the exfoliating action of Salicylic Acid can aggravate inflammation
  • Individuals using prescription retinoids or strong exfoliating acids — stacking multiple actives may cause irritation; consult a dermatologist before combining
  • Pregnant or nursing women — while Salicylic Acid is generally considered safe in low concentrations, high-dose Niacinamide should be used under medical guidance

How to Use

  1. Wet your face with lukewarm water to open pores and prepare the skin for cleansing
  2. Dispense a pea-sized amount of the Cicavita B5 Salicylic Acid Gentle Cleanser onto your fingertips
  3. Gently massage the cleanser onto damp skin in circular motions for 30–60 seconds, focusing on the T-zone and areas with active breakouts
  4. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water and pat the skin dry with a clean towel
  5. While the skin is still slightly damp, apply a few drops of the Carenel Niacinamide 10% Zinc 1% Serum all over the face, avoiding the eye area
  6. Follow with a light, alcohol-free moisturiser to lock in hydration and maintain barrier function
  7. Use this combination once daily in the evening, or twice daily if your skin tolerates it well; always wear sunscreen during the day when using Salicylic Acid

Routine Fit

This Acne Combo system is best used as a targeted evening routine step. After removing makeup or sunscreen with an oil-based cleanser (if needed), apply the Cicavita B5 Salicylic Acid Gentle Cleanser, then follow with an alcohol-free toner on damp skin. Layer the Carenel Niacinamide 10% Zinc 1% Serum next, and finish with a non-comedogenic moisturiser. In the morning, switch to a gentle, non-exfoliating cleanser and a lightweight moisturiser with SPF. This combination is not designed for simultaneous use with other exfoliating acids or retinoids — rotate nights if combining with other active treatments.

Check on Delivery: Inspect the product carefully when you receive your order. Packaging can vary between batches — the tube, box, or label may look slightly different from photos while the product remains the same original item.

Returns: After delivery is accepted, returns or exchanges depend on Emart's active return policy and product condition.

Storage: Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep out of reach of children. Check expiry date on packaging before use.

Patch Test: If you have sensitive skin, apply a small amount to your inner wrist and wait 24 hours before full use. Stop use if irritation occurs.
